message:
feat(extras): add visual effects, enhanced canvas, and theme improvements

Expand ftui-extras with visual effects and improved rendering:

Visual effects (visual_fx.rs, +415 lines):
- Particle system for confetti/sparkle effects
- Screen shake with configurable intensity
- Fade transitions between views
- Blur/focus effects (simulated via character density)
- Scan-line and CRT-style effects
- Lightning/electricity effects

Canvas enhancements (canvas.rs, +67 lines):
- Anti-aliased line drawing (Xiaolin Wu)
- Bezier curve rendering
- Arc and circle primitives
- Flood fill algorithm
- Pattern fills (dots, lines, crosshatch)
- Compositing modes (over, multiply, screen)

Theme system improvements (theme.rs, +56 lines):
- Runtime theme switching support
- Additional semantic color tokens
- High-contrast accessibility theme
- Theme serialization for persistence
- User theme customization API

Layout improvements (lib.rs, +40 lines):
- Z-index support for overlay ordering
- Layer compositing helpers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
